title: Minecraft: Java Second Edition
description: A second edition of Minecraft Java parodying Windows 98 Second Edition that adds new features, compatibility, and fixes.
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5165ed21411e20c2cbc57563fbe849cbf73c615a.png)

Is a 'Bare bone' Modpack of Minecraft Java parodying Windows 98 Second Edition that adds new features, compatibility, and fixes.

Minecraft Java SE project is aimed to add and expand gameplay features that mojang overlooked and didnt bother to improve, This is a client-side modpack so switching between vanilla world should be okay, you are also expected to add any mods you want for yourself.

**View the Versions page before download/Updating The Modpack!**

**Require atleast 4gb memory allocation after installation!**

## **🔑 _Key Features_ :**
- ## **✅ Proper Third Person Gameplay**
- ## **✅ Optifine Resource pack Compability**
- ## **✅ Improved Performance**
- ## **✅ LoD System**
- ## **✅ Backport World generations**
- ## **✅ Easy Multiplayer setup**

Initial Release of Minecraft Java SE Features (1.20.4JSE1.0):
- Proper Third person Gameplay
- Community Bug fixes
- Supports Optifine resources pack
- Support Shaders
- Added LoD system in Render distance
- Memory Optimization
- Added Ambient sounds
- Added Sound reverberation
- Animated Player movement
- In-game Downloadable Resources

Modpack License

This modpack is licensed under the MIT License, but only as it pertains to the modpack configuration and custom modifications made by the pack creator.

This modpack is a compilation of various third-party mods, each of which is subject to its own respective license. Users must comply with the licensing terms of each included mod.

This modpack is distributed for non-commercial purposes only.
No monetary gain is permitted from its distribution.
Proper attribution must be given to the original mod authors, as required by their respective licenses.

By downloading or using this modpack, you acknowledge and agree to these terms.
